response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightOccurrence
PK flight_id, flight_date, status_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY PassengerFlight
PK passenger_id, flight_id, flight_date
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : FK
ATTR seat : varchar : FK

REL PassengerFlight -> Passenger : 1..N -> 1 : FK=passenger_id
REL PassengerFlight -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id, flight_date
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> DepartureAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> ArrivalAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL FlightOccurrence -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id, flight_date
REL FlightOccurrence -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL FlightOccurrence -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
